summary: Testing completed for CFDI/SAT module improvements and Alegra integration features. All new features verified working: Emisor/Receptor filters, Export Excel, Date range sync, Clear data dialog, Multi-company architecture.

minor.issue: 404 error - double /api prefix in URL. Frontend is calling /api/api/bank-accounts instead of /api/bank-accounts
Sync endpoints take long time due to large data volumes and Alegra API rate limiting (250 req/min). This is expected behavior.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts have -1 dimensions initially. Non-blocking but should be fixed for cleaner console.

emisor_filter.description: Text input filter for Emisor (searches by name and RFC)

receptor_filter.description: Text input filter for Receptor (searches by name and RFC)
receptor_filter.notes: Filter works correctly, shows 0 results when no match

date_from_filter.description: Date input for filtering CFDIs from a specific date

date_to_filter.description: Date input for filtering CFDIs until a specific date
date_to_filter.notes: Date range 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 shows 55 of 194 CFDIs

export_excel.description: Export filtered CFDIs to Excel file
export_excel.notes: Successfully exported 194 CFDIs to Excel. Toast message '194 CFDIs exportados a Excel' displayed.

sync_date_range.description: Date range inputs for Alegra sync (Desde/Hasta)
sync_date_range.notes: Date inputs visible in Alegra integration card

clear_data_button.description: Button to clear Alegra synced data
clear_data_button.notes: Orange trash icon button visible next to Sincronizar Todo

clear_data_dialog.description: Confirmation dialog before clearing Alegra data
clear_data_dialog.notes: Dialog shows warning message and Cancelar/Eliminar Datos buttons

clear_data_endpoint.notes: Endpoint accepts clear_customers, clear_vendors, clear_payments query params

multi_company_architecture.notes: User has company_id in JWT token, all data endpoints filter by company_id

action_items: Fix double /api prefix in bank-accounts API call (frontend/src/pages/CFDIModule.js line 122)
critical_code_review_comments: CFDIModule.js line 122: api.get('/api/bank-accounts') should be api.get('/bank-accounts') - axios instance already has /api prefix
Chart components show dimension warnings - consider adding minWidth/minHeight props
Alegra sync endpoints work but are slow due to large data volumes - consider adding progress indicators
context_for_next_testing_agent: CFDI/SAT module improvements tested: Emisor/Receptor text filters, date range filters, Export Excel button. Alegra integration features tested: date range for sync, clear data button with confirmation dialog. All features working correctly. Minor issue: double /api prefix in bank-accounts call causing 404.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are REAL - Alegra integration uses real Alegra API
